mapper.select: SELECT PRDCT_CD, /*상품코드*/ SEQNO, /*순번*/ USE_DATE_FLG, /*이용가능일자*/ USE_TIME_FLG, /*이용가능시간*/ USE_TIME_START_HH, /*이용가능시작(시)*/ USE_TIME_START_MM, /*이용가능시작(분)*/ CONCAT(USE_TIME_START_HH, USE_TIME_START_MM) AS USE_TIME_START, /*이용가능시작*/ USE_TIME_END_HH, /*이용가능종료(시)*/ USE_TIME_END_MM, /*이용가능종료(분)*/ CONCAT(USE_TIME_END_HH, USE_TIME_END_MM) AS USE_TIME_END, /*이용가능종료*/ USE_AGE_FLG, /*이용가능나이*/ USE_ABROAD_FLG, /*해외IP접속*/ USE_ETC1, /*이용관련 기타1*/ USE_ETC2, /*이용관련 기타2*/ USE_ETC3 /*이용관련 기타3*/ FROM UIDBS01.MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_CONTROL WHERE PRDCT_CD = #{prdctCd} /*상품코드*/ WITH UR
